title: Sediment transport under oscillatory flows
snippet: The results of Direct Numerical Simulations of the oscillatory flow over a cohesionless bed of spherical particles, mimicking sediment grains, are described. The flow around the sediment particles is explicitly computed by using the immersed boundary method, which allows the force and torque acting on the particles to be evaluated along with their dynamics. Different values of the Reynolds number and different values of the ratio between the grain size and the thickness of the boundary layer are
